calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing On Plaintiffs Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Gregory F. Winslow, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Thomas Branch,
Defendant Kimberly Rector appearing on or behalf,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Witnesses sworn and examined on behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $100,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $450.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $100,450.00

Judgment signed in open court.
